title: Okay Optimizations
description: Optimization modpack i made that includes Distant Horizon support, and works better then other popular optimization modpacks i tested.
body:
**Optimization** modpack i made that includes **Distant Horizon** support.
This pack works better then other popular modpacks i tested.
To achive max fps turn off DH.

![OK Optimization banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65cf99a0039376d9102581c63455a7d91ec283ea.png)
<details>
<summary>P.S. About perfomance</summary>

Packs i tested go up to ~900 fps on my pc.
This pack that i made reaches 1600 fps on my test world (**do your own testing to see whats best for your PC**). I had a pack that could do up to 1800, but it was wonky and didnt work w DH, so i stopped working on it and lost my files. RIP.

</details>

<details>
<summary>P.S. P.S.</summary>

~~This is probably a upload and forget project, dont mind me~~

</details>
